channel.title: Langchain on Arrans github.io
channel.description: Recent content in Langchain on Arrans github.io

item.title: eosphoros-ai/DB-GPT
item.description: AI Native Data App Development framework with AWEL(Agentic Workflow Expression Language) and Agents

item.title: danny-avila/LibreChat
item.description: Enhanced ChatGPT Clone: Features OpenAI, Assistants API, Azure, Groq, GPT-4 Vision, Mistral, Bing, Anthropic, OpenRouter, Vertex AI, Gemini, AI model switching, message search, langchain, DALL-E-3, ChatGPT Plugins, OpenAI Functions, Secure Multi-User System, Presets, completely open-source for self-hosting. More features in development
